ab: na tun maz kasu kusia taluhan cia?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: na untingik haiia kusia taluhan cia.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: na tun maz saia kusia pa-i-iuan cia?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: na kan bantas saia kusia pa-i-iuan cia.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: na tun maz kasun kusia Pinghu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: na tun kusbabai saikin kusia Pinghu cia.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: na tun maz kasu kusia Pinghu cia?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: na tun hatu saikin kusia Pinghu cia.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: na tun maz kasu ku lumah?
en: How do you go home?

ab: na tun ciiun saikin kulumah.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: natun maz a Ciang kusia pasnanavan?
en: How does Ciang go to school?

ab: tundaza Ciang mas tunhusulan kusia pasnanavan cia.
en: Ciang goes to school by train.

ab: maz tundazas Dahu cia kusia Kiukai?
en: How does Dahu go to church?

ab: tun tampu Dahu a kusia Kiukai.
en: Dahu  goes to church by bicycle.

ab: adu tun dazas ciiun kusia pasnanavan?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: ni, tun basu saikin kusia pasnanavan.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: tun tampuas aupa kusia pasnanavan?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: ung, tun tampu saikin kusia pasnanavan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: tun dazas aupas kauti kusia Takau?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: ung, tun dazik kauti kusia Takau.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: adu tun dazas tunhusulan? adu tunkusbabai kusia Taitu?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: tun kusbabai saikin, tun kusbabai hai mastas tundazas tunhusulan mabiskav.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: adu tundazas tamunus, adu kana-anak unting haiia kusia Kiukai?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: kana-anak saikin unting haiia kusia Kiukai, mastan haiia mas tamunus cia madauzung!
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: adu malaisku imu lumah mas babalivan cia?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: maldahvi, tun utubai saikin mais kusia babalivan cia.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: adu malaisku iubiing mas pasnanavan cia?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: malaisku, mahtu kanmazav kudi.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: adu malaisku a kakaunan mas tunbasuan cia?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: maisisia tunbasuan cia munapav, mudadan tu ima taiktaik hai taunadipin.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
